subcodes.first_line: The consummate wisdom of God, however, is manifold and not every soul is apprised of its mysteries
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار باوفا همچو گمان مفرما که از یادت آنی فارغم لا والله هر دم با کمال وفا
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
